name: Unit Tests

# Triggered either directly on push/PR within the app repo,
# or dispatched by the playwright suite repo before integration tests run.

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  unit:
    name: Unit Tests (placeholder)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5

    steps:
      - name: Run unit tests
        run: |
          echo "::notice::Unit tests placeholder — always passes."
          echo "Replace with: npm test / npx jest / npx vitest run"
